summary: Tested Profile Picture Avatar Upload and Video Highlights S3 backup features. Fixed routing issue where /profile was showing RatingProfilePage instead of ProfilePage. All core features working correctly.

profile_avatar_features: 1. Profile page loads with data-testid='profile-page' - PASS
2. Avatar button exists with camera icon overlay on hover - PASS
3. File input for avatar (accept='image/*') exists - PASS
4. Avatar upload triggers error toast when S3 not configured - PASS (shows 'Failed to upload photo')
5. Navbar shows letter fallback 'A' for user without avatar - PASS
highlights_features: 1. Highlights page loads with video upload area - PASS
2. POST /api/highlights/upload returns doc with video_url: null when S3 not configured - PASS
3. Video stored locally (video_path set) even when S3 fails - PASS
4. GET /api/highlights returns list of user's highlights - PASS
backend_api_verification: 1. GET /api/auth/me returns user with avatar field (empty string) - PASS
2. POST /api/auth/login returns user with avatar field - PASS
3. PUT /api/auth/profile accepts avatar field update - PASS
4. POST /api/upload/image returns 503 when S3 not configured - PASS (503 in logs, 520 via Cloudflare)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route conflict - /profile was rendering RatingProfilePage instead of ProfilePage. Changed RatingProfilePage route to /rating-profile
FIXED: Updated PlayerDashboard 'My Profile' link to use /rating-profile for stats view
FIXED: Updated LeaderboardPage player click to navigate to /rating-profile/:userId
ProfilePage avatar button (lines 89-106) correctly implements hover overlay with camera icon
Navbar AvatarImage/AvatarFallback pattern (lines 161-166) correctly shows image or letter fallback
Video highlights upload (highlights.py lines 44-100) correctly handles S3 failure by keeping video_url null
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile avatar upload and video highlights S3 backup features tested. Key finding: Cloudflare may convert 503 responses to 520, so frontend shows generic 'Failed to upload photo' instead of specific S3 error. Backend correctly returns 503 with 'S3 not configured' message. Route fix applied: /profile now correctly renders ProfilePage, /rating-profile renders RatingProfilePage.

infrastructure_notes.cloudflare_behavior: Cloudflare sometimes converts 503 Service Unavailable to 520 Web Server Error. This is infrastructure behavior, not application bug.
infrastructure_notes.toast_message_variance: Due to Cloudflare 520, users may see 'Failed to upload photo' instead of 'S3 not configured. Ask the admin...' - the specific message requires 503 status code.
